## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (no behavior change for users who weren't hitting the bug)
- [ ] New feature (additive, no breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (API signature changed, config field renamed, etc.)
- [ ] New platform integration
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no user-visible change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the build / tests in the folder I changed (see folder README).
- [ ] I updated the CHANGELOG.md if this is user-visible.
- [ ] I updated the affected README / docs.
- [ ] My commits follow the convention in CONTRIBUTING.md.
